result:
Completed additional implementation work on entropy_hunt_v2.html and extended the Node UI harness. Changes: added an auto-demo toggle/button and staged timeline controls in entropy_hunt_v2.html so the demo can deterministically script packet loss, a contention auction, a drone_2 dropout, and a survivor confirmation run aligned to entropy_hunt.md; added helper functions for packet/button state, scripted contention/survivor staging, and per-second elapsed scheduling inside tick(); updated entropy_hunt_ui.test.mjs with DOM classList support and a new end-to-end auto-demo test covering the scripted milestones.
